title: Short term financial goals: Examples that actually work
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: Most people know they should be saving money. But "save more money" isn't a goal. It's a wish. The difference between a wish and a goal is specificity, and that's exactly what short term financial goals give you.

title: 529 plan rules: What the money can and cannot be used for
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: You've been saving in a 529 account for years. Tuition day arrives. Then someone tells you that a specific expense you planned to pay for might not qualify. That's a gut-punch moment.

title: Checking account vs savings account: Which one do you actually need
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: Most people open a bank account without ever asking why one type exists and the other doesn't. You just pick one, sign the papers, and move on.

title: Best credit cards for small business owners
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: You're running a small business, and every dollar matters. Maybe you're spending $800 a month on office supplies in Texas or putting $3,000 a month on travel for client meetings in Chicago.

title: Complete guide to refinancing student loans
author: SavingsClub Research Team

title: How to prepare financially for a recession
author: SavingsClub Research Team
excerpt: Picture this: your employer announces layoffs on a Tuesday morning. You weren't expecting it. Your emergency fund has $400 in it. Your credit cards are carrying balances. And rent is due in two weeks.

excerpt: You're working hard, paying your bills on time, and doing everything right. But your savings account at your local Oklahoma City bank is still earning 0.40% APY.
